lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.0: The base DTC provides the complete description of the failure
lists.8: No Bus Signal / Message Specific SubType
lists.20: Circuit Short to Ground or Open
lists.21: Circuit Short to Battery or Open
lists.24: Current Flow Below a Specified Range
lists.25: Current Flow Above a Specified Range
lists.26: Circuit Resistance Below a Specified Range
lists.27: Circuit Resistance Above a Specified Range
lists.31: Electrical Conditions detected during a few moment
lists.33: Signal Amplitude Below a Specified Range
lists.34: Signal Amplitude Above a Specified Range
lists.35: Signal remains Low when Transitions are Expected
lists.36: Signal remains High when Transitions are Expected
lists.37: Improper Signal Shape (plot of Amplitude with Respect to Time)
lists.40: Circuit which is Superimposed a Signal Voltage
lists.50: Low Pulse is too Narrow with Respect to Time
lists.51: Low Pulse is too Wide with Respect to Time
lists.52: High Pulse is too Narrow with Respect to Time
lists.53: High Pulse is too Wide with Respect to Time
lists.56: Incorrect Number of Cycles in a Given Time Period
lists.74: Mismatch between Hardware Connected and Hardware Expected
lists.75: Internal Temperature Above a Specified Range
lists.82: Some Part of the Program has not been Enabled
lists.83: Some Part of the Program has been Disabled
lists.85: Need to Program Sub System (or Vehicle) Option Content
lists.98: Two (or More) Input Parameters compared for Plausibility
lists.99: Function actived for Greater than a Specified Time Period
lists.101: Fewer Transitions than a Specified Number
lists.102: More Transitions than a Specified Number
lists.103: Correct Change of parameter(s) in Response to a Particular Event has not been detected
lists.104: Detection of a System Event that was not caused by System itself
lists.113: No Motion Detected in response to Energizing the Component
lists.114: No Motion Detected in response to Closing the Component
lists.115: No Motion Detected in response to Opening the Component
lists.116: Excessive Duration in response to Energizing the Component
lists.117: Unable to Move the Component to the Emergency Position
lists.119: Unable to Move the Component to the Commanded Position
lists.120: Incorrectly Adjusted or Aligned Component Detected
lists.121: Actuator Operational but Driven Device not Operating
lists.122: Component has an Unexpected Gas (or Liquid) Flow
lists.123: Fluid Level too Low for Proper Operation
lists.129: Validity Bit equal to 'invalid' or Post Processing Invalid
lists.130: Corresponding Rolling Count Value being unproperly Updated
lists.131: Message with an Incorrect Protection Calculation
lists.132: Circuit Quantity Below a Specified Range
lists.133: Circuit Quantity Above a Specified Range
lists.134: Circuit Quantity Not Plausible given to Operating Conditions
lists.145: Component Parameter Outside its Expected Range
lists.146: Component Performance Outside its Expected Range
lists.148: Component Operating in an Incorrect Way
lists.151: Component Operation Prevented by an Obstruction
